title: Why Must I Die?
writer: George Waters, Richard Bernstein, Herbert G. Luft
actors: Terry Moore, Debra Paget, Bert Freed
plot: Dottie Manson commits a murder for which club singer Lois King is arrested, tried, and condemned to die. The story line wanders through the trial and Miss King's final hours on Death Row. The true killer is finally ready to confes...
